Testimonials

What my clients say

Real feedback from people I've worked with. Their experiences tell you more about my approach than I ever could.

  • Working with you was effortless. You captured exactly what our brand needed and the photos immediately elevated our website.

    Emma Chen

    Prisma Design

  • These product shots transformed our online sales. Your attention to detail while keeping the images aspirational was perfect.

    Marcus Rodriguez

    Altura Apparel

  • You made the entire experience comfortable and fun. The images perfectly capture both my pieces and their story.

    Sophia Williams

    Jewelry Designer

  • Our team headshots have never looked this good. Professional yet approachable, with impressive consistency.

    James Thornton

    Meridian Tech

  • Your editorial eye is exceptional. You delivered images that told a complete story while staying exactly on brief.

    Olivia Park

    Style Quarterly

  • Your photography sold our properties faster than expected. You capture spaces in their best light while maintaining realism.

    David Chen

    Real Estate Developer

FAQ

FAQ

Got questions?

Here are the most common things clients ask before booking. If you need to know anything else, just reach out directly.

© August Renner

© August Renner

© August Renner

What equipment do you use for your photoshoots?

I use professional full-frame cameras with prime lenses, plus appropriate lighting for each project. I always bring backup gear to ensure nothing interrupts your shoot.

How long will it take to receive my photos?

Portrait sessions are delivered within 2 weeks, commercial projects within 2-3 weeks. Rush delivery is available when needed.

Do you travel for photoshoots?

Yes! No travel fees within 30 miles. For destinations beyond that, I charge a simple flat rate for transportation and accommodation.

How much does it cost?

I'll send you a detailed prep guide after booking. The most important thing is to come ready to collaborate and enjoy the process.

Do I need hair and makeup services for my shoot?

Professional styling can elevate your portraits but isn't required. I work with talented artists who can be booked as add-ons to your session.
